topic: From 'I'm bored' to their first $90 weekend
caption:
Last Saturday he had nothing to do. This Saturday he made $90 mowing three neighbors' yards.

HustleUp walks teens through exactly how to start, charge, and grow a real side hustle.

The confidence that follows? That part is free.

Give them a head start → hustleup.us

#parentingteens #raisingteens #teenentrepreneur #raisingentrepreneurs #lifeskills #moneyskills #confidentkids #teenconfidence #teenmoney #screentime #parentingwin #hustleup #teenwork #yardwork
alt_text: A teen boy smiling proudly while holding cash outside in a neighborhood, a lawn mower visible behind him on a freshly cut lawn.

copy.before: Bored teen, phone glued to hand
copy.body: One weekend. A simple lawn care hustle. Your teen went from restless to responsible, and the confidence on their face? Priceless.
